name: go-build
description: go build — Go compiler. Output binaries carry BuildInfo (module + VCS metadata) which the go-build attestor extracts and writes as a JSON sidecar so the evidence survives strip(1).
title: go-build

llmHints.on_match: go build/install observed. The go-build attestor captures BuildInfo (module graph + vcs.revision + build settings) and persists a .gobuild.json sidecar next to each binary so the evidence survives strip(1).

positiveSetup: Invoke cilock with argv starting "go build"
negativeSetup: Invoke cilock with unrelated argv (e.g. `echo unrelated`)
